title: Combat Man
description: Adds one hostile mob called "Combat Man" that emulates Player PvP Combat.
body:
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sqJW2Xu8Mk)

# Combat Man

This mod adds one hostile mob, called the "Combat Man". Combat Man is an attempt to elevate hostile mob combat by emulating how Players PvP.
##

***Combat Man features:***
- Spawns with random weapons, armor, and an off-hand PvP item.
- Spawns at night in a large group.
- Targets Players, Villagers, and even each other. (large groups of combat men is just chaos)
- Panics and runs away when the opponent is a lot stronger or when he can't win.
- Combat Man can drink potions, throw ender pearls, and even water bucket clutch!

##

This was made in participation in the April Fools mod jam in MCreative Discord Server.
